display.purpose: Page-level hero figure or title — net worth, plan name. One per page.

body.purpose: Default running text; cap prose at 65–75ch.

data.purpose: All currency, percentages, quantities, prices — JetBrains Mono with tabular-nums.

shadows.name: action-rest
shadows.purpose: The only resting shadow — lifts the single primary CTA off the surface.

shadows.name: transient-lift
shadows.purpose: Flyout menus and toasts floating above content while active.

motion.name: state-transition
motion.purpose: Default for hover/focus/background state changes (buttons, rows, inputs).

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The single primary call-to-action per region. Action Blue, soft corners, the only resting shadow.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 10px 24px; border-radius: 8px; background: #2563eb; color: #fff; font-family: 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; border: none; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px 0 rgb(0 0 0 / 0.05); cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 150ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #1d4ed8; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #2563eb; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Primary Button (Small)
components.description: Compact primary action for toolbars and inline contexts.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary-sm { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 6px 16px; border-radius: 6px; background: #2563eb; color: #fff; font-family: 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 150ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-primary-sm:hover { background: #1d4ed8; } .ds-btn-primary-sm:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #2563eb; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Default field — white fill, thin gray border, 40px height to align with react-select.
components.css: .ds-input { height: 40px; width: 100%; padding: 0 12px; border: 1px solid #e5e7eb; border-radius: 6px; background: #fff; color: #111827; font-family: 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; transition: border-color 150ms ease-out, box-shadow 150ms ease-out; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #6b7280; } .ds-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: #2563eb; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgb(37 99 235 / 0.15); }

components.name: Card
components.description: White surface on the gray page field. Flat at rest; separation via tonal step + optional 1px border.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e5e7eb; border-radius: 8px; padding: 16px; } .ds-card-title { margin: 0 0 4px; font-family: 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 600; color: #111827; } .ds-card-figure { margin: 0; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 600; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; color: #111827; }

components.name: Info Alert
components.description: Full-bordered tint block — never a side-stripe. Four hue variants on the 50/200/700 ramp.
components.css: .ds-alert-info { border: 1px solid #bfdbfe; border-radius: 8px; padding: 12px; background: #eff6ff; color: #1d4ed8; font-family: 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; }

components.name: Gain / Loss Figure
components.description: Monetary delta — mono, tabular, hue paired with a directional arrow so it never relies on color alone.
components.css: .ds-gain, .ds-loss { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; } .ds-gain { color: #059669; } .ds-loss { color: #dc2626; }

components.name: Empty State
components.description: Teaching empty state — faint icon, muted title, optional description and action. Never 'nothing here'.
components.html:
▢

No holdings yet

Import a CSV or add your first transaction to start tracking value.
components.css: .ds-empty { text-align: center; padding: 48px 16px; font-family: 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-empty-icon { font-size: 2.25rem; color: #d1d5db; margin-bottom: 16px; } .ds-empty-title { margin: 0; font-size: 1.125rem; color: #6b7280; } .ds-empty-desc { margin: 4px 0 0; font-size: 0.875rem; color: #9ca3af; }

narrative.overview: bc-view is reference-grade. Like a good almanac, it earns trust by being right, plain, and well-ordered — charts, tables, and plain language that demystify wealth across a long horizon. The page is a quiet gray field on which white surfaces hold the figures; a dark slate header frames the work like the spine of the volume. Numbers are set in a monospace face so columns align to the decimal and the eye trusts them. The personality is calm, trustworthy, precise, with a warm and reassuring hand on the components — generous padding, soft corners, teaching empty states. Color is never ornament: it is status. It rejects the legacy-brokerage clutter, crypto/meme hype, and spreadsheet/enterprise intimidation.
keyCharacteristics: Tonal layering, not shadows: gray page → white surface → slate header.
Monospace numerals; tabular alignment is non-negotiable for money.
Semantic color only — gain/loss and capability domains. Never decorative.
Warm, teaching defaults; depth available but never forced.
One primary blue CTA per region; the accent is rare on purpose.

rules.name: The Status-Only Color Rule
rules.body: Color carries meaning or it does not appear. Gain/loss hues, capability hues, and the one Action Blue are the entire working palette. No decorative gradients, no tinted backgrounds for warmth.

rules.name: The Colorblind Honesty Rule
rules.body: Gain and loss must never rely on hue alone. Always pair the green/red with a sign, arrow, or label.

rules.name: The Tabular Numerals Rule
rules.body: Every figure that lives in a column is set in JetBrains Mono with tabular-nums. Money that doesn't align to the decimal reads as untrustworthy.

rules.name: The One Sans Rule
rules.body: DM Sans is the only proportional face. Never introduce a second sans for display; weight and size carry hierarchy.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. Elevation is earned by interaction (hover, focus, float), not granted at rest.

dos: Do set every figure in JetBrains Mono with tabular-nums.
Do keep one Action Blue (#2563eb) CTA per region; the accent's rarity is its power.
Do convey depth with the gray→white→slate tonal layers; keep cards flat at rest.
Do use capability hues (Wealth #3b82f6 / Independence #f97316 / Invest #10b981) to signal which domain a screen belongs to.
Do pair gain/loss color with a sign or arrow so colorblind users read direction.
Do write empty states that teach the interface; give them an icon, a title, and a next action.
Do keep body text at Muted (#6b7280) or darker — never Faint for paragraphs (contrast floor 4.5:1).
donts: Don't look like a legacy bank / brokerage: no gray-on-gray clutter, no density without a clear primary figure.
Don't look like crypto / meme hype: no neon gradients, no gamified dopamine, no confetti, no casino energy.
Don't look like a spreadsheet / enterprise grid: every dense table still needs hierarchy and a scannable lead figure.
Don't use border-left/border-right > 1px as a colored accent stripe on cards or alerts.
Don't use gradient text or decorative glassmorphism anywhere.
Don't add a second proportional sans for display — DM Sans only.
Don't apply color decoratively; if it doesn't mean gain/loss, a capability domain, or the action, it doesn't appear.
Don't introduce fluid clamp() heading sizes; product UI uses the fixed rem scale.
